claim_bullets.bullet_text: Basic holy magic list available to priests without exception (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.99-104).
Spells include Cure Wounds, Sanity, Turn Undead, and Transfer Mental Power (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.99-104).
Cure Wounds heals wounds and deals damage to undead (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.99-104).

source_record_text: Basic Holy Magic List (part 1) from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, pages 99-104
